## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. Lead with the user-visible change, not the implementation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI, refactor
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## How was it tested?

<!-- Unit tests added/updated? Tested against sandbox? Manual steps? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] README updated if a public API or install step changed
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or PII in the diff
